series_description: Investigative Proceedings are files that document the activities of the Board staff in investigating complaints and possible disciplinary actions against registrants, including: public complaint forms and attached documentation, correspondence to and from the complainant and/or respondent, referral notices from external agencies, court proceedings and outcomes, licensing information, notice of opportunity for hearing letters, hearing scheduling letters, interview and phone notes, hearing exhibits, hearing outcome letters, adjudication orders, court filings, subpoenas, and requests for information/documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: If proceedings result in board action, retain until scanned, or five years. If the investigation does not result in board action, retain until scanned, or for two years. ; Paper: If proceedings result in board action, retain until scanned, or five years. If the investigation does not result in board action, retain until scanned, or for two years.

series_description: Data collected from an electronic timekeeping system to establish payable work hours and attendance including, but not limited to, time of day employee begins and ends work on a given day, hours worked each day, and total hours worked each work week.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until State Audit, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until State Audit, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement Records
series_description: Documents created for the disbursements of payroll warrants, checks, reports, and journals providing a breakdown of employee pay and hours worked collectively and individually.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Official minutes, orders, and decisions of a state agency, commission, board, or council.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Records used to draft agency rules, including worksheets, Joint Committee on Agency Rule Review proceedings, and transcripts of public hearings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after rule is published ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after rule is published

series_description: Used by state agencies to request that the Attorney General pursue collection of dollars owed to them that they have not been able to collect.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documents pertaining to public requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor, redacted and un-redacted responsive records. Maintained to document compliance with public records law obligations (
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years ; Paper: Retain for 3 years

series_title: Physical Inventory Records and Fixed Asset Reports
series_description: Records, reports, and other working documents which detail the annual fixed asset inventory of equipment owned or leased by an agency. Includes description and location which detail the annual fixed asset of the office. These records are compared to OAKS records to reconcile differences and used to compile an annual report.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years or until superseded, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years or until superseded, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Bank Deposit Slips, Ledgers, Bank Statements, Cancelled Checks and Related Documents
series_description: Bank Deposit Slips, Ledgers, Bank Statements, Cancelled Checks and Related Documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until State Audit, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until State Audit, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
